atomicity_rule: Each git operation is a single atomic command. A commit must include all staged changes in one call. A push must reference a single remote ref.

domain_actions.git_stage: Stage specified files or paths via git add
domain_actions.git_commit: Commit staged changes with PMCRO trail metadata in commit message
domain_actions.git_push: Push committed changes to remote ref
domain_actions.git_diff: Run diff against HEAD or specified ref — read-only
domain_actions.git_tag: Tag the current HEAD with a version label
domain_actions.git_merge: Merge specified branch into current branch
domain_actions.git_open_pr: Open pull request against protected branch via platform API
